title: Lack of Unit Tests for New Logic
description: The ingestion command lacks unit tests for the new logic introduced in the recent changes. This could lead to undetected bugs in production.

root_cause_potential: Missing test coverage for newly added ingestion logic
Insufficient test scenarios for edge cases
No automated testing of ingestion command functionality
Risk of undetected regressions in production
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Add unit tests covering various scenarios for the ingestion process

immediate_fixes.action: Create comprehensive unit tests for ingestion command logic
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure new functionality works correctly and prevent regressions

immediate_fixes.action: Add test cases for edge cases and error scenarios

immediate_fixes.rationale: Automate testing to catch issues early

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - Potential for undetected bugs to reach production
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Medium - Testing gap that affects code quality
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Should be addressed to maintain code quality standards
